data.title: Write RED test for doc-writer.md plugin boundary routing rule
data.description:
testing_mode: RED

Add assertion 7 to tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh that verifies doc-writer.md contains the plugin boundary routing rule.

RED test (must fail before implementation):
1. Add assertion to tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh:
   - doc-writer.md contains 'NEVER' AND 'plugins/dso' somewhere before 'The Bright Line Decision Engine' section
   - doc-writer.md schema section mentions 'docs/designs/' as a valid output location
2. Run the test — the new assertion must FAIL (RED) because doc-writer.md does not yet have the constraint
3. Add to .test-index: plugins/dso/agents/doc-writer.md:tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh [test_doc_writer_has_plugin_boundary_constraint]

Acceptance criteria:
- [ ] test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh has new assertion for doc-writer.md routing
  Verify: grep -q 'test_doc_writer_has_plugin_boundary_constraint\|doc.writer.*plugin.*boundary\|doc.writer.*NEVER\|doc.writer.*constraint' tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh
- [ ] .test-index has entry for doc-writer.md with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'doc-writer.md.*test_doc_writer_has_plugin_boundary_constraint' .test-index
- [ ] test runs and new assertion fails (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
